appearance_section.imageFormats: JPEG · PNG · WebP · GIF · AVIF — max 10 MB
appearance_section.autoThemeDesc: Switches theme automatically based on sun.sun (sunrise/sunset).

performance_section.fpsDescription: Measures browser rendering FPS in real time to diagnose slowdowns.
performance_section.intro: Disable costly visual effects to improve performance on tablets and small devices.
performance_section.reduceBlurDesc: Reduces backdrop-filter from 20–40px to 4px on all cards.
performance_section.disableModalAnimationDesc: Replaces the card-opening animation with a simple fade.

system_section.ingressDesc: Use this URL to open the dashboard without the Home Assistant sidebar (wall display, WallPanel, kiosk mode).
system_section.ingressNotAvailable: Only available when running as a Home Assistant add-on.

language_section.overridesDescription: Override specific translation keys with your own text.
